title: Search Interest in Messi Retirement After World Cup Final
description: Reports indicate social media activity and emotional scenes following Spain's victory over Argentina in the 2026 final.

sources.title: Lamine Yamal and Lionel Messi share a moment after Spain takes down Argentina in the FIFA World Cup Final
Feeling sad, Messi? Social media erupt over Argentina runners-up
World Cup 2026: Spain vs Argentina - Lionel Messi in tears after Argentina are beaten by Spain

sections.heading: World Cup Final Outcome
paragraphs: According to FOX Sports, Lamine Yamal and Lionel Messi shared a moment after Spain took down Argentina in the FIFA World Cup Final.
The BBC reports that Lionel Messi was in tears after Argentina were beaten by Spain.

sections.heading: Public Reaction
paragraphs: Yahoo Sports Canada reports that social media erupted over Argentina becoming runners-up.
The coverage highlights reactions to Messi's emotional state following the match.

sections.heading: Search Data
paragraphs: The search term "messi retirement" has a reported lower bound of 500 searches in the CA region.
This trend data was published on July 19, 2026.

faq.q: Who won the World Cup Final mentioned in the reports?
faq.a: According to FOX Sports and the BBC, Spain defeated Argentina.
The BBC reports that Messi was in tears after Argentina were beaten by Spain.
Yahoo Sports Canada reports that social media erupted over Argentina finishing as runners-up.

review.notes: rules: all rules checks passed | reviewer(qwen-max): The article is well-structured and accurately reflects the provided facts. The only minor issue is that the draft mentions a specific number of searches (500) for the term 'messi retirement,' which, while within the lower bound, may not be the exact figure reported by Google. However, this does not significantly impact the overall quality or accuracy of the article.
